6:
SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(cons) FROM min_cust WHERE Segment='SME') -
    (SELECT AVG(cons) FROM min_cust WHERE Segment='LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT AVG(cons) FROM min_cust WHERE Segment='LAM') -
    (SELECT AVG(cons) FROM min_cust WHERE Segment='KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT AVG(cons) FROM min_cust WHERE Segment='KAM') -
    (SELECT AVG(cons) FROM min_cust WHERE Segment='SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
    WITH total AS (
        SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS cons
        FROM customers c
        JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency='CZK' AND ym.Date LIKE '2013-%'
        GROUP BY c.CustomerID
    ),
    min_cons AS (SELECT MIN(cons) AS m FROM total),
    min_cust AS (SELECT Segment, cons FROM total WHERE cons = (SELECT m FROM min_cons))
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT 
   (SELECT Segment FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               (agg.cons_2013 - agg.cons_2012) / NULLIF(agg.cons_2012,0) * 100.0 AS pct_growth
        FROM (
            SELECT Segment,
                   MAX(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2012' THEN SUM(ym.Consumption) END) AS cons_2012,
                   MAX(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2013' THEN SUM(ym.Consumption) END) AS cons_2013
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
            GROUP BY Segment
        ) agg
        WHERE agg.cons_2012 IS NOT NULL AND agg.cons_2013 IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY pct_growth DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )) AS max_segment,
   (SELECT Segment FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               (agg.cons_2013 - agg.cons_2012) / NULLIF(agg.cons_2012,0) * 100.0 AS pct_growth
        FROM (
            SELECT Segment,
                   MAX(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2012' THEN SUM(ym.Consumption) END) AS cons_2012,
                   MAX(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2013' THEN SUM(ym.Consumption) END) AS cons_2013
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
            GROUP BY Segment
        ) agg
        WHERE agg.cons_2012 IS NOT NULL AND agg.cons_2013 IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY pct_growth ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )) AS min_segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

   SELECT client_id
   FROM client
   WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client)
), avg_income AS (
   SELECT loan.account_id, AVG(loan.payments) AS avg_payments
